name: DevBox
postCreateCommand: cd /tmp && curl -O https://downloads.rclone.org/rclone-current-linux-amd64.zip && unzip rclone-current-linux-amd64.zip && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && cp rclone-*/rclone ~/.local/bin/ && chmod +x ~/.local/bin/rclone && echo "alias gsave='rclone sync ~/projects filesystem:devbox-projects'" >> ~/.bashrc && mkdir -p ~/projects
